name: gsap-to-smil
author: Younes LAHOUITI
description: Library to convert GSAP animations into SMIL so they run off the main thread — no JS required at runtime.

scripts.test: bun run test:non-dom && bun run test:dom && bun run test:smoke
scripts.update-version: bun update-project-version.ts && git add . && git commit -m "Update on the project version" && git push
scripts.push-lib: (git diff --quiet || (echo 'You have uncommitted changes. Please commit your changes first.' && exit 1)) && bun run update-version && bun run publish
